announcements.content: New Topic: Intelligent Agents - AIMA Chapter 2. Deadline: Friday 5pm. Discuss the definition and characteristics of intelligent agents.
New Topic: Search Algorithms - AIMA Chapter 3. Deadline: Next Monday. Compare uninformed vs informed search strategies.

messages.content: Based on AIMA 4th Edition Chapter 2, an intelligent agent perceives its environment through sensors and acts upon it through actuators.
I agree. The key distinction is that agents must be autonomous and goal-directed. AIMA Chapter 2, p.34.
Building on that, rational agents select actions that maximize their performance measure. This is the foundation of AI (AIMA Chapter 2, Section 2.2).

consensus.statement: Consensus: Intelligent agents are autonomous entities that perceive their environment through sensors, act through actuators, and select actions to maximize their performance measure.
